summary: High‑quality master cassette capture with careful cross‑fades and flip patches, though the concert’s musical details are undocumented.
review: The sole review praises this FLAC release as a pristine master‑cassette source that has been expertly edited to smooth tape pauses and patched flips. No comments on the performance itself were provided, so listeners cannot gauge the show quality from these notes alone.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights excellent tape source and meticulous editing, but provides no insight into the musical performance, limiting confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Master cassette from Mark McCue’s collection; first‑set pauses cross‑faded, tape flips patched; all FLAC files properly tagged.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance commentary in the available review; musical quality cannot be assessed.
